occupation: Data Science & AI Solutions Architect at WeMine
headline: Private Equity & Private Credit
summary: Experienced investment professional with 6 years in private credit, private equity, and venture capital. Skilled in credit analysis, asset enforcement, capital raising, and operational restructuring. Proven track record in managing distressed assets and leading successful business turnarounds. Strong background in financial modeling, portfolio surveillance, and strategic investment across diverse sectors including mining, real estate, healthcare, and technology. Fluent in English, Mandarin, and Cantonese, with a global perspective and a commitment to driving value creation and organizational transformation.

experiences.title: Professional Training in Applied Agentic AI for Organizational Transformation
experiences.description: • Architect intelligent agent solutions that autonomously reason, execute, and adapt—transforming manual multi-step processes across financial modeling, portfolio surveillance, and operational reporting into self-running workflows with built-in error handling and human escalation

experiences.title: Investment Manager, Private Credit and Structured Capital
experiences.description:
Providing private capital to Asian mid-sized companies ranging from secured trade loans, asset-backed bridge financing, and long-term structured loans.

Key duties include presenting business plans to the investment committee for funding approvals, developing and tracking recovery plans for complex international debts involving multiple lenders, and creating monitoring systems for portfolio companies

experiences.description:
Impression Investment Limited is a global investment management and advisory firm that sources and manages select investment opportunities across the public and private markets.

Our private equity & venture capital investment team targets on opportunities where we can take an active role in helping innovative companies grow their core businesses and launch new initiatives.

recommendations:
Toby Belfield

Chun Yat (usually known as Andy) was an excellent student at High School - achieving superb results, particularly in Mathematics and Economics. He was a quiet student - but extremely hardworking and very ambitious, with a high ability and desire to understand every aspect of the courses that he had chosen to take.

I remember Andy being very focussed and committed with a strong determination. Always diligent and reliable.

Andy was always keen to help others - he held a strong sense of community.

I unreservedly recommend Andy - he will be an asset to any company/organisation.

Katherine Goodey

Efficient, hard working and enthusiastic are the words which come to mind when I think about Andy. 
I taught Chun Yat (Andy) English Language at school in the UK and he was a really good student and a natural linguist who was a pleasure to teach. I had no doubt that he would make a great success of university and build a career to be proud of. It’s a pleasure following your successes Andy.
